title: Bhaagamathie
subTitle: Chanchala, an IAS officer, is imprisoned in a haunted house for interrogation. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets possessed by a spirit.

title: Pushpak Vimaan
subTitle: Tatya, an old man, is a devout follower of Sant Tukaram and he firmly believes that the holy man boarded the Pushpak Vimaan and went to heaven. He further dreams of following in Tukaram's footsteps.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

title: Sur Niragas Ho
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs composed and performed by talented artists is played back-to-back to entertain the audience.

title: Cheater
subTitle: Abhay, a man with a tendency to cheat, pretends to be an exorcist in order to visit his wealthy girlfriend's house in Mauritius.

title: Ye Re Ye Re Paisa
subTitle: Five individuals from various walks of life experience numerous struggles, problems and misunderstandings as they attempt to fulfil their dreams.

subTitle: In a village in India, a resolute young girl aspires to purse an academic and professional life. However, societal norms exert pressure on her to focus on marriage instead of her personal goals.

subTitle: A young man plans to dupe a rich widow by marrying her and inheriting her enormous wealth. However, several obstacles hinder his plans, leading to comedic events.
